title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, and you're tired of being locked out of the global market. You've got a valuable ebook to sell, but every conventional payment platform says no to your customers. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have restrictions in place that prevent you from accessing the funds you need to grow your business. You've tried reaching out to their support teams, but the response is always the same: you're in a high-risk country, and they can't service you. It's time to explore alternative options that don't require a PayPal account or a Stripe integration. But what are your choices, and which one is right for you?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are two popular platforms that allow you to sell ebooks directly to your customers. However, they both require a PayPal account, which can be a problem if you're in a restricted country. Gumroad also has a subscription model, which can be inflexible for creators who want to offer one-time purchases. Meanwhile, Stripe is a payment processor that can be integrated into your own website, but it requires a business account and can be a hassle to set up. In contrast, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processor that doesn't require a KYC check or a business account. It's a more decentralized option that allows you to accept payments from customers in restricted countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, Gumroad and Payhip have strict policies in place that prevent creators from accessing their funds. They may freeze your account or even shut it down if they suspect that you're operating in a high-risk country. Stripe has more lenient policies, but it still requires a business account and can be a hassle to set up. NOWPayments, on the other hand, has a decentralized payment system that doesn't require a KYC check or a business account. This means that you can accept payments from customers in restricted countries without worrying about your account being shut down.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, Gumroad and Payhip have varying processing times that can range from a few hours to several days. Stripe is generally faster, but it requires a business account and can be a hassle to set up. NOWPayments, on the other hand, has fast and reliable payment processing that can be automated to deliver your ebook instantly. In terms of fees, Gumroad and Payhip charge a commission on each sale, which can eat into your profit margins. Stripe and NOWPayments, on the other hand, charge a flat fee per transaction, which can be more predictable and cost-effective.
Gumroad and Payhip have strict policies in place that prevent creators from accessing their funds in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, NOWPayments is the clear winner. Its decentralized payment system allows you to automate the delivery of your ebook to customers, which means that you can focus on creating more content and growing your business. Gumroad and Payhip, on the other hand, require manual intervention to deliver ebooks to customers, which can be time-consuming and labor-intensive. Stripe can be integrated into your own website, but it requires a business account and can be a hassle to set up.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in Nigeria who wants to sell ebooks without a PayPal account or a Stripe integration, NOWPayments is the clear choice. Its decentralized payment system allows you to accept payments from customers in restricted countries without worrying about your account being shut down. Plus, its fast and reliable payment processing can be automated to deliver your ebook instantly. With NOWPayments, you can focus on creating more content and growing your business without worrying about payment processing headaches.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Stripe requires a business account and can be a hassle to set up, making it less accessible to digital creators in restricted countries.

Our bundle is designed to help digital creators like you sell ebooks and other digital products online without the hassle of payment processing. With our bundle, you can automate the delivery of your ebook to customers and focus on growing your business.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with NOWPayments and start selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal or Stripe, follow these concrete action steps: 1. Sign up for a NOWPayments account and get your API key; 2. Integrate the NOWPayments payment button into your website; 3. Set up an automated delivery system to deliver ebooks to customers; 4. Test your payment processing system to ensure it's working correctly; 5. Launch your ebook and start selling online.
NOWPayments has fast and reliable payment processing that can be automated to deliver ebooks instantly, giving you more time to focus on creating content and growing your business.
